hero.subhead: A living corpus, refreshed every night by Hermes — your 24/7 research team. Adaptive lessons. Real interview panels. Zero coaching tax.

hero.pillars.notes.title: 3D Smart Notes
hero.pillars.notes.body: Spatial diagrams of every constitutional, geographical and historical concept — rotate, dissect, master.
hero.pillars.interview.title: Real Interview Panel
hero.pillars.interview.body: Three live AI examiners — body language, follow-ups, transcript scoring against the UPSC rubric.
hero.pillars.video.title: Topic Imagination Videos
hero.pillars.video.body: 30–45 minute lectures with manim-grade visuals — from Big Bang to Bretton Woods, generated nightly.
hero.pillars.books.title: Smart Books
hero.pillars.books.body: Government schemes, Yojana, Kurukshetra and PYQs cross-linked into a single living textbook.
hero.cta.bottom.title: Ready to outscore the cohort?
hero.cta.bottom.body: Onboard in 60 seconds, take the diagnostic, and let Hermes plan your year.
